name: HWM_TCATS_VL
query: SELECT HWM_TCATS_B.TCAT_ID TCAT_ID, HWM_TCATS_TL.TCAT_NAME TCAT_NAME, HWM_TCATS_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, HWM_TCATS_B.TCAT_CD TCAT_CD, HWM_TCATS_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HWM_TCATS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HWM_TCATS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HWM_TCATS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HWM_TCATS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HWM_TCATS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HWM_TCATS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HWM_TCATS_B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HWM_TCATS_B.PERSISTENT_FLAG PERSISTENT_FLAG, HWM_TCATS_B.SGUID SGUID, HWM_TCATS_B.UOM UOM, HWM_TCATS_B.ACR_RULE_ID FROM HWM_TCATS_B, HWM_TCATS_TL WHERE HWM_TCATS_B.TCAT_ID = HWM_TCATS_TL.TCAT_ID AND HWM_TCATS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
